title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-29
body: Queue triaged (6 reports). Actions taken: BANNED spam_wave_42 (phishing links across multiple channels), BANNED toxic_runner (repeated targeted harassment). WARNED bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation). No action on trusted_helper (dispute, not abuse), core_maintainer (false positive from brigading), or new_member_17 (minor formatting issue). Community safety remains our priority.
